suggestions.title: Avoid duplicate trapi_request_sent / trapi_response_received events
suggestions.description: Duplicate TRAPI event names were emitted in both function_app.py and trapi_client.py. Logging was centralized in function_app.py to keep one canonical event stream per run.

suggestions.title: Assert exact required event counts and schema
suggestions.description: Function app test now asserts exactly one required event for each key log event and verifies required extra fields for each event.
